'''鈭歸-v-j-ch''' ('''kawavjechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:variegate|variegate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-v-j-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:variegate|variegate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-v-j-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kawavjechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwavjechoko|thiwavjechoko]] || [[word:jiwavjechoko|jiwavjechoko]] || [[word:shiwavjechoko|shiwavjechoko]] || [[word:kiwavjechoko|kiwavjechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwavjechoko|thuthuwavjechoko]] || [[word:jujuwavjechoko|jujuwavjechoko]] || [[word:shushuwavjechoko|shushuwavjechoko]] || [[word:kukuwavjechoko|kukuwavjechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwavjechoko|thuwavjechoko]] || [[word:juwavjechoko|juwavjechoko]] || [[word:shuwavjechoko|shuwavjechoko]] || [[word:kuwavjechoko|kuwavjechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwavjechoko|thuwavjechoko]] || [[word:juwavjechoko|juwavjechoko]] || [[word:shuwavjechoko|shuwavjechoko]] || [[word:kuwavjechoko|kuwavjechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewavjechoko|thewavjechoko]] || [[word:jewavjechoko|jewavjechoko]] || [[word:shewavjechoko|shewavjechoko]] || [[word:kewavjechoko|kewavjechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowavjechoko|thothowavjechoko]] || [[word:jojowavjechoko|jojowavjechoko]] || [[word:shoshowavjechoko|shoshowavjechoko]] || [[word:kokowavjechoko|kokowavjechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowavjechoko|thowavjechoko]] || [[word:jowavjechoko|jowavjechoko]] || [[word:showavjechoko|showavjechoko]] || [[word:kowavjechoko|kowavjechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowavjechoko|thowavjechoko]] || [[word:jowavjechoko|jowavjechoko]] || [[word:showavjechoko|showavjechoko]] || [[word:kowavjechoko|kowavjechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙wavjechoko|th忙wavjechoko]] || [[word:j忙wavjechoko|j忙wavjechoko]] || [[word:sh忙wavjechoko|sh忙wavjechoko]] || [[word:k忙wavjechoko|k忙wavjechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawavjechoko|thathawavjechoko]] || [[word:jajawavjechoko|jajawavjechoko]] || [[word:shashawavjechoko|shashawavjechoko]] || [[word:kakawavjechoko|kakawavjechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawavjechoko|thawavjechoko]] || [[word:jawavjechoko|jawavjechoko]] || [[word:shawavjechoko|shawavjechoko]] || [[word:kawavjechoko|kawavjechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawavjechoko|thawavjechoko]] || [[word:jawavjechoko|jawavjechoko]] || [[word:shawavjechoko|shawavjechoko]] || [[word:kawavjechoko|kawavjechoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
